description.en: AnArrayBuffer,TypedArray, orDataViewprovided by the relying party's server and used as acryptographic challenge. This value will be signed by the authenticator and the signature will be sent back as part ofAuthenticatorAttestationResponse.attestationObject. This helps prevent replay attacks.

description.en: A string specifying the country in which the address is located, using theISO-3166-1 alpha-2standard. The string is always given in its canonical upper-case form. Some examples of validcountryvalues:"US","GB","CN", or"JP".
